title: Plan Work
description: Turn current repo evidence and user goals into a decision-complete implement plan. Use before broad multi-file work, design-architecture changes, or uncertain provider behavior.
body: Planning is done when implement can proceed from evidence. Gather evidence first, list decisions, define the owner package, and name the acceptance signal. For provider behavior, separate stable instruction-file contracts from reloadable skills/hooks/commands, and do not encode model/window or reload claims without current provider docs, provider source, or validated runtime evidence.
